notes: Core subject. Range from simple application outsourcing (e.g. email) to full business process offshoring (e.g. general ledger, accounts payable).
Key ITO success/failure factor identified by Kastner. Poor SLA setting, maintenance, and measurement cited as major outsourcing failure mode.
Aberdeen IT maturity model segments: Best-in-Class (20%), Average (50%), Laggard (30%). Applied to outsourcing outcomes and ROI measurement.
Full-blown business process offshoring (e.g. general ledger, accounts payable) as one end of outsourcing spectrum.
Cited as simplest form of IT outsourcing (email) as one end of outsourcing spectrum.
